untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition capabilities (Double Tops/Eve & Adam identification, peak detection, support/resistance levels, price variation between peaks, pattern morphology classification as 'tall' or 'narrow') that cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators and operators. These are visual/structural pattern properties that require candlestick pattern detection logic beyond indicator-based rules.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy entry conditions using downtrend confirmation (ADX > 25 for trend strength, price below SMA_50 for bearish context) and exit on trend reversal. However, the core signal logic—correctly identifying EADT patterns, measuring peak variation, detecting absence of underlying support, and classifying pattern geometry—requires dedicated pattern recognition not available in the indicator toolkit. The 72% success rate in bear markets and 19% average decline suggest a high-conviction short signal, but the pattern-specific selection criteria cannot be operationalized with these indicators alone.
